affiliation.name: Pôle National des Données de Biodiversité

description: This project is a robust pipeline for automatic natural language processing (NLP) and terminology alignment.
name: Cat.VocMapX
releaseNotes:
Multi-format indexing: Native support for parsing complex vocabularies (.rdf, .owl, .nt, .nq, .xml, .sdf).
5-step hybrid alignment strategy.
Parallelisation and RAM optimisation: Multi-process processing optimised for macOS (spawn compatibility) and Windows/Linux.
Dynamic batch size management based on available memory. Validation via Local LLM: Dual integration of Ollama (mistral:7b) for validating matches and resolving complex cases.
Comprehensive analytical reports: Automated generation of Excel files containing cross-tabulation statistics and conditional formatting (scores, LLM verdicts).
